remarks: All the ambiance of a New York City townhouse, and just a few steps to the heart of New Canaan and the Metro-North train station. This classic floor plan feels just like a single-family home. Inside you will find an updated kitchen with granite countertops, beautiful cabinets, a formal dining room, and a living room with a wood-burning fireplace. There are beautiful hardwood floors throughout the home. The spacious bedrooms offer a retreat for relaxation, while the private terrace and manicured landscaping provide opportunities for outdoor enjoyment. There is a garage included and plenty of storage in the attic and basement. Welcome to easy and convenient living!
